sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63761" key="logo/mimos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λογό-μῑμος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n63761.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">writer</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">actor of spoken mimes</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1392.tlg001:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hegesand.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
